title: Induced Einstein-Hilbert term from matter leg-field back-reaction

tests.name: K1_finiteness_convergence
tests.note: Π(0) UV-finite (converges <1%); Π₂ bounded over the compact BZ, residual drift is the logarithmic running of G, not a divergence

tests.name: K2_eh_kinetic_term_emerges
tests.note: Π₂>0 ⇒ back-reaction generates a (∇Φ)² term = induced EH kinetic term; gravity is dynamical, not assumed

tests.name: K3_sector_scaling_corrects_F56
tests.note: Π(0)∝Λ² is the Λ/vacuum-energy sector (what F56 used); the EH coefficient Π₂ runs ~log (Adler–Zee), a distinct sector
